pkgmetadata.longdescription: __OpenAL__ is a minimalistic sound API that aims to provide bare features for /spacialized audio/. The API looks like the *OpenGL* one, thus the libs are pretty great together. Up to now, no OpenAL extension is supported. You're highly invited to contribute ;). __EAX__ is not supported yet eiher. It'll be embedded in future releases, soon. __IMPORTANT__: In order to build and install "al", you'll need to pass the path of the /include/ and /libs/ directory of your OpenAL installation. Then use this to install: @ cabal install --extra-include-dirs=path_to_include --extr-lib-dirs=path_to_libs @
